description_long: This obelisk features a striking metallic sculpture of a stylized, winged creature with prominent, upward-curving horns and outstretched wings, perched atop a tall, faceted black pedestal. The wings are detailed with layered, feather-like segments, and the body is sleek and streamlined, suggesting a mythical or fantastical bird. The pedestal is octagonal and solid, providing a strong visual and structural base for the sculpture. On one side of the base, there is an attached, jagged-edged black structure resembling stylized battlements or a crown, adding a dramatic architectural element. The overall color palette is dominated by dark metallic grays and deep blacks, giving the monument a somber, imposing presence. The surface finish is mostly matte with some subtle sheen on the metallic parts, and there are no visible inscriptions or text.
description: A dramatic obelisk with a metallic, horned winged creature atop a tall, faceted black pedestal, featuring jagged architectural elements on one side. The design is dark, imposing, and highly ornamental.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full wingspan, upward-curving horns, and the octagonal black pedestal directly beneath the creature.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the winged figure and the protruding jagged structure attached to the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wings, the creature's tail, and the full width of the pedestal and attached structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the jagged architectural feature extending from the base.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk is highly ornamented with a large, stylized winged creature featuring layered feathers, horns, and a dramatic pose. The attached jagged structure on the base adds further decorative complexity.
attribute_base_design: The base is a tall, faceted octagonal pedestal in black, with a solid, monolithic appearance. One side features an attached, jagged-edged structure resembling battlements or a crown, also in black.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by the upward-curving, pointed horns of the winged creature, which are smooth and metallic, serving as the visual apex of the monument.
